text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh? I've never seen this sort of dessert before.
What could it be?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my! "The Peak of Calories! Whipped Cream
Mountain ☆ Ultra Rich Pudding"?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can just barely spy the pudding beneath the
cascade of snowy whipped cream. It looks so
velvety!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: What's more, it's only being offered today?! Gulp...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, as of late I've been feeling my weight
climb, if just oh-so slightly. I... I must use my iron
will to resist this temptation!
choice_data_list: Use your willpower to overcome the temptation!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...I am triumphant! Yes, it was a complete shutout!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Now, Trainer, let's go for a run! Right now! I must
pour all this energy into something!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen demonstrates insurmountable
focus against her dietary threat. In fact, she's in
even better condition than before.
